contract_summary: This function is a put-wrapper that decrements the reference count of the upper_dev network device by calling __netdev_adjacent_dev_link_lists. It removes an adjacency link from the neighbor lists. The caller must have previously acquired a reference on upper_dev (e.g., via a corresponding get) and must not use upper_dev after this call returns a failure. On success, the reference is released; on failure, the caller should handle the error appropriately without further use of upper_dev.
